safety-general.title: General Safety Requirements
safety-general.text: All electrical installations must comply with the fundamental safety principles of AS/NZS 3000:2018 to ensure protection against thermal effects, overcurrent, and fault currents.

wiring-methods.title: Wiring Systems
wiring-methods.text: Wiring must be selected and installed to provide adequate mechanical protection and prevent degradation from environmental factors.

branch-circuits.title: Branch Circuit Requirements
branch-circuits.text: NEC guidelines for branch circuits, ensuring correct sizing of conductors and overcurrent protective devices based on load calculations.
